reference: I was just eating yellow cake with chocolate frosting mixed with popping mini eggs. I started feeling pinching sensations a little higher than my left breast, which felt like it was my heart. Is this normal? I am twenty-one years old, I weigh between one hundred and fifty-five and one hundred and sixty pounds, and I am five feet one inch tall. I do not have any medical conditions, nor do I take any medications.
text: I was just eating yellow cake with chocolate frosting mixed with popping mini-eggs. I started feeling pinching sensations a little higher than my left breast. It felt like it was my heart. Is this normal? I am 21 years old. I weigh between 155 and 160 pounds, and I am 5 feet 1 inch tall. I do not have any medical conditions, nor do I take any medications.
